data.body:
## Description

Insert new Phase 3.5: Story-Level Research between Phase 3 (Walking Skeleton & Vertical Slicing) and Phase 4 (Verification & Traceability) in `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md`.

**Files to edit**: (1) `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` (edit), (2) `.test-index` (edit — remove RED marker)

Content:
- Phase heading: `## Phase 3.5: Story-Level Research (/dso:preplanning)`
- Trigger conditions: fires per-story when decomposition reveals gaps:
  - A story depends on an external API whose behavior is undocumented
  - A story assumes a data format not described in the epic context
  - Agent confidence on a key implementation decision is low
- For each qualifying story, use WebSearch/WebFetch to find prior art, documentation, or working examples
- Research Notes section structure in story specs: item-level format with 4 fields (trigger condition name, query summary, source URLs, key insight) — same structure as brainstorm Research Findings defined in dso-mac2
- Graceful degradation: if WebSearch/WebFetch fails, continue without research rather than blocking the workflow
- Differentiation from Phase 2.25 (Integration Research): Phase 2.25 fires for stories with external integration signals (tools, APIs); Phase 3.5 fires for any decomposition gap regardless of integration involvement
- Context file schema note: Research Notes are stored in story ticket body via `ticket comment`, accessible via `ticket show`. Context file schema update is out of scope — the context file is an optimization cache, not the source of truth.
- test-exempt: metadata/schema — SKILL.md is markdown consumed by LLM agents, no executable code

**TDD Requirement**: RED test from cae6-fdad fails on all assertions. After this task, all assertions turn GREEN and the RED marker is removed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `bash -n tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh` passes
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains story-level research phase heading
  Verify: grep -qE '^## Phase 3\.5.*Story.*Level.*Research' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md documents trigger conditions in Phase 3.5 section
  Verify: sed -n '/^## Phase 3\.5/,/^## Phase/p' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md | grep -qiE '(undocumented|assumed.*format|low.*confidence)'
- [ ] SKILL.md references WebSearch/WebFetch in Phase 3.5 section (not elsewhere)
  Verify: sed -n '/^## Phase 3\.5/,/^## Phase/p' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md | grep -q 'WebSearch\|WebFetch'
- [ ] SKILL.md includes Research Notes with at least 2 of 4 field names
  Verify: sed -n '/^## Phase 3\.5/,/^## Phase/p' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md | grep -ciE '(trigger condition|query summary|source URLs|key insight)' | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] SKILL.md includes graceful degradation in Phase 3.5 section
  Verify: sed -n '/^## Phase 3\.5/,/^## Phase/p' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'graceful.*degrad\|continue.*without.*research'
- [ ] Story-level research test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep 'preplanning/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -qF '[test_phase_heading]'
